name: Artisan Partners Asset Management Inc.
business: Artisan Partners Asset Management Inc. provides high value-added active investment strategies in growing asset classes to sophisticated clients worldwide, generating revenue primarily from investment advisory fees based on a percentage of clients' average assets under management.
sellsTo: Institutions (pension plans, endowments, foundations, governments, insurance companies)
Intermediated wealth channel (financial advisors, broker-dealers, 401(k) platforms)

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Grandview Property Partners closed
catalysts.sentence: On January 2, 2026, we closed on the acquisition of Grandview Property Partners, a real estate private equity firm specializing in originating, developing, acquiring and managing middle market properties across the United States.
Mr. Kane has announced his intention to step back from portfolio management responsibilities effective June 30, 2026; he will remain on the U.S. Value team as a managing director and adviser.

catalysts.event: Annual grant of long-term incentive awards approved
catalysts.sentence: During the first quarter of 2026, the Board approved the annual grant of long-term incentive awards with a grant date fair value of $71.8 million consisting of $21.2 million of restricted share-based awards and $50.6 million of franchise capital awards, to certain employees pursuant to the Company's 2023 Omnibus Incentive Compensation Plan.

catalysts.event: Expected increase in effective tax rates
catalysts.sentence: We currently estimate that our GAAP and adjusted effective tax rates will increase 1% to 3% beginning in 2027 as a result of the compensation deduction limitation rules within the One Big Beautiful Bill Act ( OBBBA ).
